title: Terry West
compiled_truth: Terry West is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-14 to 2002-01-22), Terry West sent 10 and received 66 emails, totalling 76 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (7), [Stephen Wood](people/stephen-wood) (6), [Agatha Tran](people/agatha-tran) (6), [Kerry Roper](people/kerry-roper) (6), [Howard Selzer](people/howard-selzer) (6). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, cfp, inbox.
